violations.text: Strainer was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Strainer was removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Single service bowls and cups are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the upstairs area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine in the basement have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contacts surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Reduced Oxygen Packaged fish was observed thawing without oxygen being allowed being introduced into the thawing process. Fish was 35 Degrees Fahrenheit, packaged was cut open. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit by the grill line. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
Shellstock tags did not have all of the required information. Time and date were lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023

Wood is used in the construction of potato slicer. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. PIC has order the required parts to move the slicer. Through discussion with PIC Correct by date has been determined. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

The Prep sink by the pasta station was observed lacking an air gap, the dishwasher in the bar area was observed with out an air gap. An air gap must be present to prevent the back flow of water. PIC has put in a maintenance request. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

At time of arrival food was being prepared, with out the presence of a trained food safety manager at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

The hand-washing sink in the dish area was blocked by a strainer, the hand sink on the line and pasta prep area was observed not operational. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information. Time and date were lacking. Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Fish was observed stored below raw meat product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, knives, ice machine(basement)) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

French fries were observed held at 108 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

Line prep unit 2 was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Misc - food items were voluntarily disposed of. Whipped butter was observed held at 60 DF product was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. (oysters,cesar dressing, meat cooked to order). New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2023

Meat is being vacuumed packaged on site without an approved HACCP Plan. Establishment is to submit documents to RIDOH for approval. Establishment is not to vacuum pack until documents have been approved. One fish product was observed vacuumed packed - fish product was voluntarily disposed of. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

The door to the outside, located in the side stair well, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
Ice cream was observed uncovered with condensate leaking into the ice cream - ice cream was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

Potatos, and pasta is being processed in a room not designed for food processing. Food processing areas must be equipped with a hand sink and walls that are easily cleanable. The potato slicer was observed being shieled by cardboar to prevent splashing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

Wood is used in the construction of the in the potato slicer area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
Walkin cooler door gasket was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the upstairs ice machine has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

The Prep sink by the pasta station was observed lacking an air gap, the dishwasher in the bar area was observed with out an air gap. An air gap must be present to prevent the back flow of water. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
The hand sink in the dishwashing area is slow to drain. Sinks must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Signage for employee handwashing is lacking in the employees' restrooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
